reviewed_head.subject: Complete iteration-0004 official-surface rebase for the conversations_api lane

review_scope.limitation: rebase content is materially complete, but detached review bundle closure is still incomplete

verdict.summary: The official-surface rebase work is substantively complete, but the detached implement review bundle is still missing request-state, authority-closure, and bundle-path closure.

findings.summary: The detached review bundle is missing plan handoff artifacts that are part of the implement request basis.
Authority-closure files are still absent from the bundle even though the packet claims them for replay.
Detached bundle path layout does not yet line up with the packet's own policy_framework-relative references.
The bundle boundary requires a conversations_runtime source root, but the bundled provenance metadata does not yet instantiate it.

next_patch_set: Open iteration-0005 for detached-bundle closure on top of the rebased lane artifacts
Bundle the missing plan handoff and authority-closure files
Normalize detached policy_framework paths and add conversations_runtime provenance metadata
Recreate the implement review bundle with iteration-0005 identifiers
